name: agent-index-filesystem-s3
description: Filesystem adapter for Amazon S3 object storage
author: agent-index

prefix.description: Key prefix for all paths. Omit or empty string for bucket root.

required_domains_note: S3 endpoints are region-specific (e.g., s3.us-east-1.amazonaws.com, sts.us-east-1.amazonaws.com). The wildcard covers all regions. If your network policy requires exact domains, add: s3.{region}.amazonaws.com and sts.{region}.amazonaws.com for your configured region.
